headline: Top 3 Consumer Stocks You May Want To Dump This Month
summary: Three stocks in consumer discretionary sector have high RSI values, signaling potential overbought conditions. Best Buy, BJ's Restaurants, and Wolverine Worldwide all have RSI values above 70 and have seen significant gains in the past month.
